properties.remark: SEVERAL REPORTS OF DIME TO QUARTER SIZED HAIL.

*** 3 INJ *** TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN APPROXIMATELY 2 MILES ENE OF GARDENDALE AND TRANSLATED NE FOR APPROXIMATELY 1 MILE. MAXIMUM WIDTH APPROXIMATELY 50 YARDS. A BARN...A TRAVEL TRAILER...AND METAL OUTBUILDINGS WERE DESTROYED. A LARGE CAMPER...A RV...AND A HORSE TRAILER WERE BLOWN OVER. ROOF DAMAGE OCCURRED TO A NUMBER OF HOMES...AND SEVERAL METAL OUTBUILDINGS AND FENCES WERE DAMAGED OR DESTROYED. TORNADO LIFTED OR DISSIPATED APPROXIMATELY 1230 AM CDT.
